zh.lifeSummary: 當John Leavitt於1474年出生在英國越可爾博爾頓 珀西時，他的父親William Leavitt IV26歲，母親Constanlis Constantia Wickersley24歲。他於1493年與Agnes de Saville在英國英格蘭越可爾博爾頓 珀西結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1526年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國越可爾博爾頓 珀西。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Leavitt于1474年出生在英国越可爾博爾頓 珀西时，他的父亲William Leavitt IV26岁，母亲Constanlis Constantia Wickersley24岁。他于1493年与Agnes de Saville在英国英格兰越可爾博爾頓 珀西结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1526年在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国越可爾博爾頓 珀西。

nameMeanings.name: Leavitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French leuet ‘wolf cub’ (see Low 3).
habitational name from any of various places in Normandy called Livet. All are of obscure, presumably Gaulish, etymology.

variants.name: Low
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tumulus, mound or hill, Middle English lowe, from Old English hlāw (see Law 2).

Scottish and English: nickname for a short man, from Middle English lah, lowe (Old Norse lágr; the word was adopted first into the northern dialects of Middle English, where Scandinavian influence was strong, and then spread south, with regular alteration of the vowel quality).

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a violent or dangerous person, from Anglo-Norman French lou, leu ‘wolf’ (from Latin lupus). Wolves were relatively common in Britain at the time when most surnames were formed, as there still existed large tracts of uncleared forest.

variants.name: Levitt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Isador, Isadore, Ari, Batya, Hersh, Mayer, Meyer, Rina.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Leavitt was born in 1474, in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Leavitt IV, was 26 and his mother, Constanlis Constantia Wickersley, was 24. He married Agnes de Saville in 1493, in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1526, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England.

fr.East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, Engla: East and West Appleton, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Leavitt est né en 1474, à Bolton Percy, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Leavitt IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Constanlis Constantia Wickersley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Saville en 1493, à Bolton Percy, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1526, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Bolton Percy, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Leavitt 1474 in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Leavitt IV 26 und seine Mutter Constanlis Constantia Wickersley 24. Er hat 1493 in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Saville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1526 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Leavitt è nato il nel 1474 nel Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Leavitt IV, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Constanlis Constantia Wickersley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Saville nel 1493, nel Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1526, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Leavittが1474年にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ペルシで生まれた時，父William Leavitt IVは26歳，母Constanlis Constantia Wickersleyは24歳であった。1493年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ペルシでAgnes de Savilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1526年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ペルシにて埋葬された。

ko.East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, Engla: 영국 요르크실르 이스트 앤드 웨스트 애플턴
ko.lifeSummary: John Leavitt(이)가 1474년 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Leavitt IV(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Constanlis Constantia Wickersley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에서 Agnes de Saville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1526년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Leavitt nasceu em 1474, em Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Leavitt IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Constanlis Constantia Wickersley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Saville em 1493, em Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1526, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, Engla: эаст анд вест эпплетон, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Leavitt родился в 1474 г. в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Leavitt IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Constanlis Constantia Wickersley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Saville в 1493 г. в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1526 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Leavitt nació en 1474, en Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Leavitt IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Constanlis Constantia Wickersley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes de Saville en 1493, en Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1526, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
